reference: Hi, thank you for reaching out. I really appreciate your concern. Based on the history you provided, I could say that this could be an autoimmune reaction, which sometimes occurs after a history of fever. However, there is no need to worry; this could also be related to a viral infection. I hope this information helps you. Have a nice day.
text: Hi, thank you for reaching out. I really appreciate your concern. Based on the history you provided, I could say that this could be an autoimmune reaction, which sometimes occurs after a history of fever. However, there is no need to worry. This could also be related to a viral infection. I hope this information helps you. Have a nice day.
